data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — rewrote Phase 1 (auto-detection with package.json/.husky/.github/workflows file reads) and Phase 2 (Socratic dialogue, removed all rigid menus, added Jira bridge section). Also fixed test bug: grep -c exits 1 on 0 matches, causing '|| echo 0' to append duplicate 0. Changed to '|| true'.
